headline: A $500,000 Dividend Portfolio That Pays More Than a Full-Time Minimum Wage Job
summary: A full-time federal minimum wage worker in the United States earns $7.25 an hour, or about $15,080 a year before taxes, working 40 hours a week for 52 weeks. The question for anyone with capital: what does it take to clear that bar without having to ask anyone, “Do you want fries with that?” On ... A $500,000 Dividend Portfolio That Pays More Than a Full-Time Minimum Wage Job
